message:
fix(fuse,mvcc): add backpressure shedding for fsync/fsyncdir and extract preflight_fcw

ffs-fuse:
Add load-shedding guards to the fsync and fsyncdir FUSE handlers. When
should_shed() signals backpressure, these operations now return EBUSY
early instead of queueing unbounded work, matching the pattern already
used by other write-path operations.

ffs-mvcc:
Extract the first-committer-wins (FCW) conflict detection loop and
chain-pressure enforcement from commit_transaction into a dedicated
preflight_fcw method. This simplifies the main commit path and makes
the validation logic independently testable. The chain_cap variable
that was captured before the loop is replaced by a direct field access
inside the per-block commit loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
